personal.name: Alex Rivera
personal.title: Full-Stack Developer & UI Designer
personal.tagline: I build beautiful, high-performance digital experiences.

about.bio: I'm a passionate full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience crafting clean, user-centric digital products. I specialize in React, Node.js, and modern CSS — turning complex problems into elegant solutions.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured online store with real-time inventory, Stripe payments, and an admin dashboard. Built for scale with a microservices architecture.

projects.title: Design System Library
projects.description: A comprehensive React component library with 60+ accessible components, dark mode support, and full Storybook documentation.

projects.title: AI Task Manager
projects.description: A productivity app powered by GPT-4 that auto-categorizes tasks, estimates durations, and suggests optimal scheduling based on your habits.

projects.title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
projects.description: A live data visualization dashboard with WebSocket integration, interactive charts, and customizable widget layouts.

projects.title: Mobile Banking App UI
projects.description: A sleek, accessible banking app UI/UX prototype with biometric authentication flows, spending analytics, and multi-currency support.

projects.title: REST API Boilerplate
projects.description: A production-ready Node.js API starter with JWT auth, rate limiting, Swagger docs, and automated testing pipeline.

experience.description: Lead developer for the company's SaaS product. Architected the React frontend from scratch, reducing load time by 40% and improving user retention.
Built and maintained 15+ client websites and web apps. Introduced automated testing, cutting QA time in half.
Collaborated with startups to design and develop their MVPs. Delivered projects on time with measurable business impact.
